{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Fathom mages
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The influence of [[Fathom mages]] can be avoided by getting far enough from the planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
